About Us

Built on Trust.
Delivered with Care.

True Care Remodeling is a licensed construction and remodeling company based in Canoga Park, CA. We specialize in delivering personalized, high-quality projects for homeowners across the San Fernando Valley and greater Los Angeles.

We are committed to Communication, Integrity, and Superior Craftsmanship on every project — no matter the size.

Communication

Transparent updates at every stage

Integrity

Honest pricing, no surprises

Craftsmanship

Premium materials, expert execution

Our Services

Complete Remodeling Solutions

From concept to completion — every detail handled with expertise and care.

Kitchen Remodeling

Cabinets, countertops, islands, custom layouts & full kitchen transformations that add real value.

Bathroom Remodeling

Tile work, fixtures, vanities, walk-in showers & complete bathroom renovations done to perfection.

Get a Quote

Full Remodels & ADUs

Room additions, ADU construction & whole-home renovations handled permits to final walkthrough.

Get a Quote

Landscaping & Hardscaping

Patios, walkways, retaining walls & beautiful outdoor living spaces that extend your home.

Get a Quote

Interior & Exterior Paint

Professional prep, prime & finish for any interior or exterior surface — flawless every time.

Get a Quote

Roofing

New roof installations, repairs & complete weather protection solutions you can count on for years.

How It Works

A Simple 3-Step Process

A clear, stress-free path from your first call to a beautifully finished space — no surprises.

01

Consultation & Quote

We discuss your vision, assess the space, and provide a clear timeline and fully transparent quote — completely free.

02

Design & Preparation

We refine the design together, select materials, and handle all necessary permitting before a single nail is driven.

03

Quality Construction

Efficient, high-quality construction with regular updates, culminating in a final walkthrough and quality check.

Privacy Policy Terms of Service

Privacy Policy & Terms of Service

Last updated: March 28, 2026  •  Effective immediately

1. Who We Are

True Care Remodeling ("Company," "we," "us," or "our") is a licensed general contractor operating in California (CA License #1147388), located at Canoga Park, CA. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect the information you share with us through our website, chat tool, phone calls, or any other communications.

2. Information We Collect

We collect information you voluntarily provide, including your name, phone number, email address, property address, and project details. We do not collect payment or financial information through this website. We may also collect non-personal usage data (browser type, pages visited) through analytics tools.

3. How We Use Your Information

Your information is used solely to respond to your remodeling inquiries, provide free estimates, schedule on-site consultations, and send project-related communications. We do not sell, rent, trade, or share your personal information with any third party for marketing or commercial purposes.

4. California Privacy Rights (CCPA)

If you are a California resident, you have the right to: (a) know what personal information we collect and how it is used; (b) request deletion of your personal information; and (c) opt out of any sale of personal information (we do not sell personal data). To exercise these rights, contact us at info@truecareremodeling.com or (818) 200-0455. We will respond within 45 days as required by law.

5. Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA)

By submitting your phone number through our website or chat tool, you expressly consent to receive calls and/or text messages from True Care Remodeling at the number provided, including calls made using an automatic telephone dialing system or pre-recorded voice, for the purpose of responding to your estimate request. Message and data rates may apply. You may opt out at any time by replying STOP or contacting us directly.

6. Data Storage & Security

Information you submit is stored securely and accessed only by authorized True Care Remodeling personnel. We implement reasonable administrative and technical safeguards to protect your data from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

7. Cookies & Analytics

This website may use cookies and third-party analytics tools (such as Google Analytics) to understand site traffic and improve user experience. No personally identifiable information is collected through cookies alone. You may disable cookies in your browser settings at any time.

8. Third-Party Links

Our website may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., Google Maps, review platforms). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites. We encourage you to review their policies before providing any personal information.

9. No Warranty / Disclaimer

This website and all content are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. All estimates provided online or through our chat tool are preliminary, non-binding, and subject to on-site evaluation. Actual project costs may vary.

10. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, True Care Remodeling shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website or reliance on its content. Our total liability, if any, shall not exceed the amount paid by you for services actually rendered.

11. Changes to This Policy

We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

12. Contact Us

For privacy questions, data requests, or to opt out of communications, contact us at info@truecareremodeling.com or call (818) 200-0455. Mailing address: Canoga Park, CA.
